data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video evidence attachments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Photo/video evidence attachments', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of these attachments. The linked use case mentions the need for photo/video evidence, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of such functionality being implemented or tested. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: Lack of evidence for photo/video evidence attachments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of photo/video evidence attachments.
